description: Standardize all GitHub repository references to the canonical Gavin-C-Greif URL and translate non-English comments to clear technical English across the tracked repository.

userStories.title: Canonicalize GitHub repository references
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want all repository references to use the canonical GitHub URL so contributors and automation resolve the correct project destination.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace legacy repository-owner/repository references with https://github.com/Gavin-C-Greif/isometric-perspective in tracked files where they refer to this project.
Apply the update across full tracked repository scope (docs, configs, scripts, metadata, and comment text when present).
Search-based validation confirms no outdated repository references remain in scope.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Translate non-English comments to technical English
userStories.description: As a contributor, I want all non-English comments translated to clear technical English so maintenance and review are consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Translate all non-English comments in tracked files to English.
Preserve technical intent while improving clarity for maintainers.
Search-based validation confirms no non-English comments remain in scope.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Keep cleanup text-only and behavior-safe
userStories.description: As a release owner, I want this cleanup to avoid logic changes so runtime behavior remains stable.
acceptanceCriteria: Changes are limited to repository references, comments, and related documentation text.
No intentional API, runtime, data model, or behavior changes are introduced.
Any unavoidable non-textual edit is documented with rationale.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Provide deterministic validation evidence
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want repeatable validation outputs so completion can be verified quickly and confidently.
acceptanceCriteria: Document and run repeatable searches for legacy repository references and non-English comments.
Record validation results with explicit pass/fail statement for both checks.
Run npm run lint and npm test as final gate evidence.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
